title: Junior Investment Banker at BSE Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at BSE Global Group
jsonLd.description:
BSE Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSE Global Group:
BSE Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE Global Group!
